mapper.insert:
select case when max(mine_id) is null then '1' else max(mine_id)+1 end id from mine_type
INSERT INTO mine_type( mine_id, mine_nombre, mine_ext, mine_estado) VALUES (#{mineId}, #{mineNombre}, #{mineExt}, #{mineEstado});
mapper.select: select count(mine_id)::integer from mine_type where mine_nombre = #{mineNombre} and mine_id!=#{mineId}
select count(mine_id)::integer from mine_type where mine_nombre = #{mineNombre}
